title: “Pretty easy to clear up”: Candace Owens questions Blake Neff over Erika Kirk TPUSA leadership video after Charlie Kirk death
summary_full: Candace Owens and Blake Neff publicly clashed on X over Charlie Kirk’s alleged succession video and TPUSA leadership controversy. Owens demanded proof that Charlie Kirk approved Erika Kirk as successor, while Neff accused Owens of spreading conspiracy-driven attacks against the organization after Kirk’s death.
